profile.description: Controls optimization aggressiveness. Balanced is recommended for most players.

SAFE.description: Conservative settings. Larger entity spread limit, longer cache flush intervals.

BALANCED.description: Moderate optimization. Good for most colonies.

AGGRESSIVE.description: Maximum optimization. Tighter entity spread, shorter cache flush. For large towns.

instrumentation_enabled.description: Publishes performance counters to the game profiler. Off by default.
